# signoz_saved_view (Resource)

A saved SigNoz explorer view (logs or traces). The query state goes in `data` as JSON.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "signoz_saved_view" "errors" {
  name        = "Errors (last 15m)"
  source_page = "logs"
  data = jsonencode({
    compositeQuery = {
      queryType = "builder"
      panelType = "list"
      builderQueries = {
        A = {
          dataSource        = "logs"
          queryName         = "A"
          aggregateOperator = "noop"
          expression        = "A"
          disabled          = false
        }
      }
    }
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String) Saved query state as JSON (compositeQuery, filters, columns, …). Compared semantically.
- `name` (String) View name.
- `source_page` (String) Explorer the view belongs to: `logs` or `traces`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server-assigned view id.
